summary: MATKA 11 logo branding and responsive layout testing completed. Logo component working correctly on login, signup, and dashboard pages. Minor header overflow issue found at 320px viewport - profile and logout buttons extend beyond viewport. App works well on 375px+ screens.

ui_bugs.issue: At 320px viewport, header content width is 362px causing profile-icon-link and logout-button to be clipped/hidden (x=296 and x=332 respectively)

issues: Header buttons overflow on very small screens (320px)
Consider reducing button sizes or using a hamburger menu for all actions on small screens

passed_tests: Login Page: MatkaLogo component visible with golden gradient M icon + MATKA + 11
Login Page: No horizontal overflow at 320px, 375px, 390px
Signup Page: No horizontal overflow at 320px, 375px, 390px
Dashboard: MatkaLogo component visible in header
Dashboard: Sidebar toggle button visible and clickable
Dashboard: Admin panel button visible (for admin users)
Dashboard: Footer nav has 5 items (Home, Fund, Refer, Bid History, Result Chart)
Dashboard: Footer nav items fit within viewport at 320px
Dashboard: Game cards fit within viewport at 320px
Dashboard: Balance card buttons (जमा करें, निकासी) fit within viewport
Dashboard: No horizontal body overflow at 320px, 375px, 390px
Wallet Page: Deposit and Withdraw buttons visible
Wallet Page: Footer nav visible with 5 items
Wallet Page: No horizontal overflow at 320px, 375px, 390px
Wallet Page: Transactions list displays correctly
action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix header overflow at 320px viewport - consider reducing gap between header buttons or moving profile/logout to sidebar menu on very small screens
critical_code_review_comments: MatkaLogo component correctly implements golden gradient styling with M icon, MATKA text, and 11 text
app-shell CSS class correctly sets max-width: 480px for phone-like experience
index.css has overflow-x: hidden on html, body, #root to prevent horizontal scroll
FooterNav has max-w-[480px] mx-auto for proper centering
Header uses gap-1.5 and compact button sizes (p-1.5) but still overflows at 320px
React key prop warning in console - minor issue with Link component spreading props

success_rate.frontend: 95% (17/18 tests passed, 1 minor overflow issue at 320px)

context_for_next_testing_agent: MATKA 11 logo branding implemented correctly. Responsive layout works well on 375px+ screens. Minor header overflow at 320px viewport - profile and logout buttons extend beyond visible area. The app uses app-shell class with max-width: 480px for phone-like layout. Footer nav has 5 items that fit correctly on all tested viewports.

matka_logo.styling: Golden gradient M icon + MATKA in gold gradient + 11 in white
